tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Neon Trees : Animal
Tabbed by  : Hariz Abdul Hadi (twitter.com/CubaTryTest)
Tuning     : Standard (EADGBe)

Chords used:
F  - 133211 or 033210
[ch]C[/ch]  - 032010
[ch]Bb[/ch] - 013331
[ch]Dm[/ch] - 000231
[ch]Am[/ch] - 002210


[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Here we go again [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
I kinda wanna be more than friends [/tab]

So take it easy on me 
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch]
I'm afraid you're never satisfied[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Here we go again[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]C[/ch]
We’re sick like animals we play pretend [/tab]

You’re just a cannibal 
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And I'm afraid I won’t get out alive [/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
No I won't sleep tonight[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Oh, oh, I want some more [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, oh, what are you waitin' for?[/tab]

Take a bite of my heart tonight

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Oh, oh, I want some more [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, oh, what are you waitin' for? [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
What are you waitin' for? [/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
Say goodbye to my heart tonight[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Here we are again[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
I feel the chemicals kickin' in[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
It's gettin' heavier I wanna run and hide [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
I wanna run and hide[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
I do it every time[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
You're killin' me now[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
And I won't be denied by you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
The animal inside of you[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Oh, oh, I want some more [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, oh, what are you waitin' for? [/tab]

Oh, oh, what are you waitin' for? [/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
What are you waitin' for? [/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]F[/ch]
Say goodbye to my heart tonight[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
Hush hush the world is quiet[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Hush hush we both can't fight it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]
It's us that made this mess [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Why can't you understand? [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bb[/ch]
Woah, I won't sleep tonight[/tab]

[Breakdown]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
     I won't sleep tonight[/tab]

Here we go again (Here we go again, here we go again)[/tab]
